justification: Top-level parser entry tests; ideal for determinism + location-tracking properties at module scope.
proposed_properties: determinism: parse(src) is a function; location coverage: every node has loc with file/line/column/offset; crash oracle: parser does not throw on well-formed source

justification: Asserts exact diagnostic codes and messages on malformed input; not generalizable as a property.
proposed_properties: n/a

justification: Integration-style parser tests over multi-construct programs; round-trip and determinism scale well here.
proposed_properties: round-trip: parse(prettyPrint(ast)) alpha-equivalent to ast; determinism on whole modules; location coverage

justification: Patterns appear in let/match/lambda contexts; round-trip catches cross-cutting structural bugs.
proposed_properties: round-trip on pattern-bearing programs; structural invariant: pattern-bound names non-empty

justification: Larger integration suite covering newer language features; broad shape invariants apply.
proposed_properties: round-trip on integration programs; determinism; location coverage

justification: Declarations are the cleanest round-trip target -- single declaration in a module re-renders to the same AST.
proposed_properties: round-trip on top-level declarations; whitespace invariance: blank lines between declarations don't change parse

justification: Literal expressions are the smallest round-trip target.
proposed_properties: round-trip on literal expressions; structural invariant: IntLit/FloatLit/StringLit/BoolLit/UnitLit shapes preserved

justification: The classic property target -- precedence and associativity preservation across re-rendering.
proposed_properties: operator precedence preservation: parens never silently disappear; round-trip on BinOp trees; structural invariant: BinOp shape preserved

justification: If/match are recursive and benefit from random nesting.
proposed_properties: round-trip on control-flow expressions; structural invariant: If has condition/then/else_; Match has expr+cases

justification: Function application chains generalize to property tests.
proposed_properties: round-trip on App expressions; left-associativity: f(a)(b) parses the same as f(a)(b)

justification: List literals; trailing-comma equivalence applies directly.
proposed_properties: round-trip on list literals; trailing-comma equivalence

justification: Record literals + spreads + updates; round-trip and trailing-comma both fire.
proposed_properties: round-trip on record literals; trailing-comma equivalence

justification: Unary operators have a bounded shape; round-trip catches mis-parses.
proposed_properties: round-trip on UnaryOp expressions; structural invariant: UnaryOp shape preserved

justification: Edge cases in operator parsing -- precedence preservation property generalizes the bug surface.
proposed_properties: operator precedence preservation; round-trip on operator expressions

justification: Tests rejection of operator-section syntax (banned in vibefun); pure error-only suite.
proposed_properties: n/a

justification: Lambdas with type annotations; round-trip + structural invariants.
proposed_properties: round-trip on annotated lambdas; structural invariant: Lambda has params with optional type

justification: Lambda parameters can be destructuring patterns; round-trip on these is high-value.
proposed_properties: round-trip on destructuring lambdas; structural invariant: pattern-bound names non-empty

justification: Lambda body precedence is a precedence-preservation problem.
proposed_properties: round-trip on lambdas with operator bodies; precedence preservation in lambda bodies

justification: Return-type annotations on lambdas; structural invariant generalizes.
proposed_properties: round-trip on return-type-annotated lambdas; structural invariant: Lambda.returnType preserved

justification: Pattern parsing -- round-trip + non-empty pattern names are strong properties.
proposed_properties: round-trip on patterns; structural invariant: pattern-bound names are non-empty strings

justification: Match cases with guards; round-trip applies.
proposed_properties: round-trip on guarded match cases; structural invariant: MatchCase.guard preserved when present

justification: Type-annotated patterns; structural invariant + round-trip.
proposed_properties: round-trip on type-annotated patterns; structural invariant: TypeAnnotatedPattern shape

justification: Or-patterns with nesting; round-trip catches associativity bugs.
proposed_properties: round-trip on nested or-patterns; structural invariant: OrPattern flattens or nests consistently

justification: Type expression parsing; round-trip on type expressions is a strong property.
proposed_properties: round-trip on type expressions; structural invariant: TypeApp/FunctionType/RecordType shapes

justification: Tuple types with arity; round-trip and structural invariant.
proposed_properties: round-trip on tuple types; structural invariant: TupleType.elements arity preserved

justification: Tuple expressions; round-trip and trailing-comma equivalence.
proposed_properties: round-trip on tuple expressions; structural invariant: Tuple.elements arity preserved

justification: Self-referencing type definitions; round-trip + structural invariant.
proposed_properties: round-trip on recursive type definitions; structural invariant: TypeDecl with mutual recursion preserved

justification: External type declarations; round-trip + structural invariant.

justification: External declarations with generics; round-trip on type params.

justification: Opaque type declarations; round-trip and structural invariant.
